name: Mory Industries Inc.
summary: Mory Industries Inc. manufactures and sells stainless steel and welded carbon steel products in Japan. It offers round stainless steel pipes and tubes; square and modified stainless steel tubes; stainless-steel-clad tubes; stainless steel joint parts, etc.; stainless steel flat bars, angle bars, and round bars; flexible stainless steel tubes; stainless steel household products; and various products from stainless steel tubes. The company also provides welded carbon steel tubes for machine and general structural purposes, and welded carbon steel square pipes for general structural purposes; and tube cutting machines and others. Its products are used in construction materials, hardware, furniture, and automotive parts. The company was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
